'''âj-f-y''' ('''jafaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pegylate|pegylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pegylate|pegylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-f-y
|-
! Lemma
| jafaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafayithi|jafayithi]] || [[word:jafayiji|jafayiji]] || [[word:jafayishi|jafayishi]] || [[word:jafayi|jafayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafayuthuth|jafayuthuth]] || [[word:jafayujuj|jafayujuj]] || [[word:jafayushush|jafayushush]] || [[word:jafay|jafay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafayuthu|jafayuthu]] || [[word:jafayuju|jafayuju]] || [[word:jafayushu|jafayushu]] || [[word:jafayu|jafayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafayufuth|jafayufuth]] || [[word:jafayufuj|jafayufuj]] || [[word:jafayufush|jafayufush]] || [[word:jafayuf|jafayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafayethe|jafayethe]] || [[word:jafayeje|jafayeje]] || [[word:jafayeshe|jafayeshe]] || [[word:jafaye|jafaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafayothoth|jafayothoth]] || [[word:jafayojoj|jafayojoj]] || [[word:jafayoshosh|jafayoshosh]] || [[word:jafay|jafay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafayotho|jafayotho]] || [[word:jafayojo|jafayojo]] || [[word:jafayosho|jafayosho]] || [[word:jafayo|jafayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafayofoth|jafayofoth]] || [[word:jafayofoj|jafayofoj]] || [[word:jafayofosh|jafayofosh]] || [[word:jafayof|jafayof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafayĂŻfĂŻf|jafayĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻfĂŻf|jafayĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻfĂŻf|jafayĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻfĂŻf|jafayĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]] || [[word:jafayĂŻf|jafayĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafayĂŠthĂŠ|jafayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jafayĂŠjĂŠ|jafayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jafayĂŠshĂŠ|jafayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jafayĂŠ|jafayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafayathath|jafayathath]] || [[word:jafayajaj|jafayajaj]] || [[word:jafayashash|jafayashash]] || [[word:jafay|jafay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafayatha|jafayatha]] || [[word:jafayaja|jafayaja]] || [[word:jafayasha|jafayasha]] || [[word:jafaya|jafaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafayafath|jafayafath]] || [[word:jafayafaj|jafayafaj]] || [[word:jafayafash|jafayafash]] || [[word:jafayaf|jafayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jafayasha|jafayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojafayasha|gojafayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijafayasha|gokijafayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafaynĂŒsha|jafaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojafaynknĂŒsha|gojafaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijafaynĂŒsha|gokijafaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafayshĂ«sha|jafayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafaynkshĂ«sha|gojafaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafayshĂ«sha|gokijafayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafayrosha|jafayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafaynkrosha|gojafaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafayrosha|gokijafayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jafaymusha|jafaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafaynkmusha|gojafaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafaymusha|gokijafaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jafaysherasha|jafaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojafaynksherasha|gojafaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijafaysherasha|gokijafaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jafayngasha|jafayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojafaynkngasha|gojafaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijafayngasha|gokijafayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jafayyasha|jafayyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojafaynkyasha|gojafaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijafayyasha|gokijafayyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jafayyamasha|jafayyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojafaynkyamasha|gojafaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijafayyamasha|gokijafayyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jafaynĂŒshĂ«sha|jafaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojafaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojafaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijafaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijafaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafaynĂŒrosha|jafaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafaynknĂŒrosha|gojafaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafaynĂŒrosha|gokijafaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafaynĂŒmusha|jafaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafaynknĂŒmusha|gojafaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafaynĂŒmusha|gokijafaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jafayshĂ«nĂŒsha|jafayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojafaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojafaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijafayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijafayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafayshĂ«rosha|jafayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafaynkshĂ«rosha|gojafaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafayshĂ«rosha|gokijafayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafayshĂ«musha|jafayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafaynkshĂ«musha|gojafaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafayshĂ«musha|gokijafayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jafayronĂŒsha|jafayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojafaynkronĂŒsha|gojafaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijafayronĂŒsha|gokijafayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jafayroshĂ«sha|jafayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojafaynkroshĂ«sha|gojafaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijafayroshĂ«sha|gokijafayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafayromusha|jafayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafaynkromusha|gojafaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafayromusha|gokijafayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jafaymunĂŒsha|jafaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojafaynkmunĂŒsha|gojafaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijafaymunĂŒsha|gokijafaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jafaymushĂ«sha|jafaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojafaynkmushĂ«sha|gojafaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijafaymushĂ«sha|gokijafaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafaymurosha|jafaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafaynkmurosha|gojafaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafaymurosha|gokijafaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jafay|jafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠfĂŠy|jĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojafay|hojafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠfĂŠy|hojĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojafay|hohojafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠfĂŠy|hohojĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjafay|nĂŒjafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠfĂŠy|nĂŒjĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjafay|nĂŒnĂŒjafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠfĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjafay|nĂŻjafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠfĂŠy|nĂŻjĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjafay|nĂŻnĂŻjafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠfĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujafay|lujafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠfĂŠy|lujĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujafay|lulujafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠfĂŠy|lulujĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijafay|lijafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠfĂŠy|lijĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijafay|lilijafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠfĂŠy|lilijĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojafay|kojafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠfĂŠy|kojĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojafay|kokojafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠfĂŠy|kokojĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejafay|kejafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠfĂŠy|kejĂŠfĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejafay|kekejafay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠfĂŠy|kekejĂŠfĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
